name: Frank - Gay? Thug?
description:
"Dawg WHAT ARE YOU SAYIN'??"

In case anyone (wich i doubt) is wondering if im dropping the beach series, no, im not, this is just a filler bot, but i did lose almost all motivation to finish it, mainly bc i put a lot of effort in those and barely got 400 chats, and because i just lost inspo lol. Im gonna make one for a lifeguard and im gonna finish them, although i had a lot more in mind

Oh and also, im planning on making a new series, possibly including angst and maybe even dead dove, I'll choose later, with its own "universe", connected characters, and its own history

Now finally about the bot

This is js a filler bot of an img i saw on ig lol, its not that serious so yeah, js enjoy it.

Strictly MalePov, sorry ladies
